Notice Ofmotion Andmotion To Compel Answers Andfurther Responses To Form Interrogatorites, Set One, And For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kathryn Tanner, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: KEISUKE NAKAGOSHI

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF KEISUKE NAKAGOSHI's Motion To Compel Answers And Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, is granted as Defendant is ordered to verify its responses within 15 days of notice of this order. The court does not determine the adequacy of the responses on this motion. The court finds that the late responses and failure to verify were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $600, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
